---
title: "Pin Your Location"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
  self_contained: False
  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE,cache=TRUE}
library(flexdashboard)
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

```{r}
library(leaflet)
library(readr)

loc <- read_csv("loc.csv")

leaflet(loc) %>%
addMarkers(data = loc, lng = , lat = loc$lat, popup= loc$name) %>% 
setView(lng =  mean(loc$lng),lat = mean(loc$lat), zoom = 8) %>% 
addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap, options = leafletOptions(minZoom = 6,maxZoom = 9)) 


```

Column {data-width=250}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

###
    
```{r}
knitr::kable(loc[1:2])
```
